step_rationale: Renal function marker; renal stress reflects hemodynamic and systemic endothelial injury post-MI.
mechanism: Creatinine elevation indicates renal hypoperfusion and glomerular dysfunction secondary to cardiorenal injury and systemic endothelial stress in acute infarction.
